project_type: Python ML Bridge trading system with MQ5 Expert Advisors for MetaTrader 5
test_framework: pytest with mock-heavy tests in python_bridge_v2/tests/
verification_instructions: Run pytest on test_v2_features.py. All 40 tests must pass. 1 pre-existing failure in test_smart_upgrades.py is known.
environment_constraints: No MT5 terminal available. Validation through pytest only. No Docker.
key_patterns: v2 system is a self-contained copy of python_bridge/. All changes are ONLY in python_bridge_v2/ and Python_Bridge_EA_v2.mq5.
